data.title: Iran’s Crypto Activity Hit $7.8B – But the Bigger Insight Isn’t the Size, It’s the Circumstances
data.description:
"Iran's cryptocurrency activity has reached an impressive total of $7.8 billion, indicating a significant engagement in this digital financial landscape; however, the more crucial aspect to consider is not merely the scale of this financial movement, but rather the unique circumstances and socio-political factors that have driven the country to increasingly adopt and integrate cryptocurrency into its economy."
source: https://blocknews.com/irans-crypto-activity-hit-7-8b-but-the-bigger-insight-isnt-the-size-its-the-circumstances/

data.title: Belarus Legalizes “Cryptobanks” as Lukashenko Integrates Crypto Into State Finance
data.description:
Belarus has taken a decisive step toward formalizing cryptocurrency within its financial system. Alexander Lukashenkohas signed Decree No. 19, creating a legal framework for so-called cryptobanks to operate under state supervision. The move officially embeds digital assets into the country’s regulated banking sector, allowing licensed institutions to combine traditional banking services with cryptocurrency operations
source: https://www.ethnews.com/belarus-legalizes-cryptobanks-as-lukashenko-integrates-crypto-into-state-finance/

data.title: Ark’s Cathie Wood claims Bitcoin is better scarce asset than gold
data.description:
Ark’s Cathy Woods claims in a recent 2026 report that Bitcoin beats gold as a scarce asset because its mathematically fixed supply make it inherently scarce.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/arks-cathie-wood-claims-bitcoin/

data.title: Grant Cardone Bets on Bitcoin Real Estate as Trump Plots Housing Shakeup — What To Expect
data.description:
Grant Cardone is converting apartment rental income into Bitcoin exposure as Trump’s housing policy changes create new investment opportunities in U. S. real estate.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/grant-cardone-bitcoin-real-estate-trump-housing/

data.title: Bitcoin Consolidates Near $95k as Expectations for $100k Remain
data.description:
Bitcoin’s price action has entered a more uncertain phase after failing to sustain momentum above the $95k zone, a level that recently flipped from resistance into support. Moreover, BTC is now trading closer to $94,000. Forcing traders to reassess short-term structure. While traders expected a clean continuation, the past week has introduced hesitation
source: https://www.techgaged.com/bitcoin-consolidates-near-95k-as-expectations-for-100k-remain/

data.title: JPMorgan Chase wages war on yield-bearing stablecoins through the GENIUS Act
data.description:
The CFO of JPMorgan Chase, Jeremy Barnum, has expressed concerns over yield-bearing stablecoins as a threat to the traditional banking system. Some interpret this as him calling for regulation through the GENIUS Act, marking a new confrontation in the longstanding battle between traditional and decentralized finance. The war between traditional and decentralized finance has reached […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/jpmorgan-chase-wages-war-on-stablecoins/

data.title: US And Taiwan Reaches A $250Bn Chipmaking Deal
data.description:
The US and Taiwan reached a trade deal on Thursday under which Taiwanese companies will invest $250 billion to boost production of semiconductors, energy, and ​AI in the US.
source: https://catenaa.com/markets/special-reports/us-and-taiwan-reaches-a-250bn-chipmaking-deal/

data.title: The US government just caved to a crypto exchange pulling support for legislation that changes everything for investors
data.description:
The US crypto industry believed it stood on the precipice of securing the regulatory legitimacy it has pursued for a decade, but the political ground has suddenly shifted beneath it. On Jan. 14, Sen. Tim Scott, the chair of the Senate Banking Committee, postponed a vote on the Digital Asset Market Clarity Act
source: https://cryptoslate.com/coinbase-veto-clarity-act-crypto-regulation-delay/

data.title: Vaulta price crashes 20% to new all-time low below $0.14
data.description:
Vaulta, formerly EOS, plunged to a lows of $0. 14 to mark its drop to a new all-time low. The token was down 20% in the past 24 hours and saw trading volume spike by more than 400%. Selling pressure might see A extend losses to a new level. Vaulta’s price has crashed 20% in the […] The post Vaulta price crashes 20% to new all-time low below $0.
source: https://coinjournal.net/news/vaulta-price-crashes-20-to-new-all-time-low-below-0-14/

data.title: Hackers Hijack WhatsApp To Steal Users’ Passwords and Drain Bank Accounts: Report
data.description:
Cybersecurity researchers say hackers are manipulating WhatsApp to steal people’s banking credentials. The researchers have discovered a banking trojan affecting people who use WhatsApp Web. The malware infects Windows computers when victims open malicious ZIP files received in messages
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2026/01/16/hackers-hijack-whatsapp-to-steal-users-passwords-and-drain-bank-accounts-report/

data.title: Bank Of America CEO Warns $6 Trillion Could Flee To Stablecoins—Here's Why Banks Are Terrified
data.description:
Bank of America warns yield-paying stablecoins could drain $6T in bank deposits, reshaping lending, funding costs, and crypto regulation battles. 
source: https://www.benzinga.com/crypto/cryptocurrency/26/01/49972482/bank-of-america-ceo-warns-6-trillion-could-flee-to-stablecoins-heres-why-banks-are-terrified?utm_source=cryptopanic.com&utm_campaign=partner_feed&utm_medium=referral

data.title: Monero’s Explosive Run Shows What Early Conviction Can Do — Here Is How $1,000 Turned Into Millions
data.description:
Monero’s explosive price surge over recent months serves as a powerful testament to the impact that early conviction in a promising cryptocurrency can yield. This remarkable journey demonstrates that an initial investment of just $1,000 has the potential to transform into millions, highlighting the incredible opportunities that can arise in the ever-evolving landscape of digital currencies. By examining the strategies of early investors and the factors that contributed to Monero's rapid ascent, we can gain valuable insights into how belief in a technology’s potential can lead to substantial financial gains.
source: https://blocknews.com/moneros-explosive-run-shows-what-early-conviction-can-do-here-is-how-1000-turned-into-millions/

data.title: New China-led crypto platform hits $55.5 billion in cross-border transactions
data.description:
A new Chinese-led crypto platform, mBridge, has witnessed a surge in cross-border transactions, reaching $55 billion across over 4,000 transactions.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/new-china-led-crypto-platform-hits-55/

data.title: Global Crypto Card Spending Hits $18 Billion as Stablecoins Go Mainstream
data.description:
The global cryptocurrency card market has crossed a major threshold, reaching an $18 billion annualized spending run rate, driven by a clear shift in how users are spending digital assets. Stablecoins are no longer limited to trading or on-chain transfers. They are increasingly being used for everyday retail payments, from groceries to dining
source: https://www.ethnews.com/global-crypto-card-spending-hits-18-billion-as-stablecoins-go-mainstream/

data.title: Nasdaq Warns Bitcoin Hardware Maker Canaan About Delisting
data.description:
Bitcoin miner Canaan faces Nasdaq delisting deadline as shares languish below $1 despite major hardware order and brief October rally.
source: https://decrypt.co/354933/nasdaq-warns-bitcoin-hardware-maker-canaan-delisting
